summary: Redfish Direct Polling & Failover Features - All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with failover panel, iLO-specific controls (Test, Diretto ON/OFF), and external URL field.

vault_credentials_with_external_url: GET /api/vault/credentials returns credentials with masked passwords
GET /api/vault/credentials/{id} returns decrypted credentials for existing ILO
POST /api/vault/credentials creates credential with external_url field
redfish_failover_status: GET /api/redfish/failover-status returns polling mode for iLO devices
redfish_test_connection: POST /api/redfish/test-connection returns error gracefully for unreachable iLO
connector_vault_credentials: GET /api/connector/vault/credentials returns decrypted credentials with valid API key
GET /api/connector/vault/credentials returns 401 for invalid API key
encryption_key_persistence: Existing ILO credential decrypts correctly (username: administrator)
frontend_ui_tests: Failover panel shows 'Stato Polling iLO Diretto / Failover'
Failover panel shows polling mode (Via Connector / Polling Diretto)
Polling Manuale button triggers manual poll
Add Credential dialog shows external URL field for iLO type
Test Connection button works (returns 'Connessione rifiutata' for unreachable iLO)
Toggle Direct Poll button toggles between 'Diretto' and 'Diretto ON'
POLLING DIRETTO badge appears when direct poll is enabled
Reveal (Mostra) button decrypts and shows password
Edit dialog shows external URL field with current value

critical_code_review_comments: redfish.py correctly implements direct polling with failover logic
Failover threshold is 120 seconds (2 minutes) without connector heartbeat
test_connection endpoint returns error gracefully (success=False with error message)
poll_cycle runs as async task when triggered manually
VaultPage.js correctly shows failover panel with polling status badges
External URL field only appears for iLO credential type in add/edit dialog
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_redfish_failover.py (new test file for Redfish failover features)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing credentials verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redfish Direct Polling & Failover features fully tested and working. All 27 backend tests pass. Frontend vault page shows failover panel with polling status (Via Connector / Polling Diretto / Failover Attivo / Offline). iLO credentials have Test and Diretto ON/OFF buttons. External URL field appears in add/edit dialog for iLO type. Test-connection endpoint returns 'Connessione rifiutata' for unreachable iLO (expected behavior since no real iLO is accessible from this environment). ENCRYPTION_KEY persistence verified - credentials survive backend restart.

mocked_apis.Redfish test-connection: Returns 'Connessione rifiutata' since no real iLO is reachable from this environment

feature_verification.feature: Redfish Direct Polling & Failover for iLO devices
new_endpoints_tested: PUT /api/vault/credentials/{id}/direct-poll - enable/disable direct polling with external_url
GET /api/redfish/failover-status - returns polling mode for each iLO device
POST /api/redfish/test-connection - test Redfish connection from backend

polling_modes.direct: Always-on direct polling (when direct_poll=true and external_url configured)
polling_modes.failover: Automatic failover when connector offline >2min and external_url available
polling_modes.offline: Connector offline and no external_url configured

frontend_features: Failover status panel with device polling mode
Test Connection button for iLO credentials
Toggle Direct Poll button (Diretto / Diretto ON)
POLLING DIRETTO badge when direct poll enabled
External URL field in add/edit credential dialog for iLO type
Polling Manuale button to trigger manual poll cycle
